svg.title: School MIS Entity Relationship Diagram
svg.desc: Entity relationship diagram for the School MIS database schema.
svg.text: Generated from Laravel migration 2026_04_11_000100_create_mis_core_tables.php and the base users table.
Legend: blue text marks primary keys; brown text marks foreign keys. Arrows point from child tables toward their referenced parent tables.
Core many-to-many bridges: student_guardian, staff_role, role_permission, and class_subjects.
